title: Talisman of the Sphere

markdown:
# Talisman of the Sphere

While holding or wearing this talisman, you have [[advantage]] on any Intelligence ([[arcana]]) check you make to control a [[sphere_of_annihilation of Annihilation]]. In addition, when you start your turn in control of a [[sphere_of_annihilation of Annihilation]], you can take a [[magic]] action to move it 10 feet plus a number of additional feet equal to 10 times your Intelligence modifier. This movement doesn't have to be in a straight line.
